commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an auto-reply session guard that treats an implicitly stale daily-reset entry as reusable when the same session id has an active reply run, plus a regression test for that rollover race.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +64. Total +88 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main computes daily staleness in session initialization and can archive the prior transcript before active-run admission. I did not run a full live provider rollover repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should verify contributor after-fix proof and the remaining CI state; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair PR.

target.title: fix(sessions): defer daily rollover during active reply runs
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Fixes #96546.

When an inbound message arrives after the daily reset boundary while the previous turn is still active, auto-reply session initialization can decide the old entry is stale before the active-run gate runs. That path used to create a replacement session and archive the old transcript, which renames the file while the active run can still append to it.

## Why This Change Was Made

The session initializer now detects when an implicit stale rollover targets the same session id that is currently registered as an active reply run. In that case it treats the entry as reusable for this turn, leaving the active run's transcript path and store reference intact. Explicit reset commands keep their existing reset behavior because the guard only applies to implicit stale rollover.

## User Impact

A long-running turn that crosses the daily reset boundary is no longer split across an archived transcript and a recreated orphan file when another inbound message arrives. The session remains attached to the live transcript while the active-run admission path handles queueing, steering, or follow-up behavior.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/auto-reply/reply/reply-turn-admission.test.ts src/auto-reply/reply/get-reply-run-queue.test.ts src/gateway/server.sessions.compaction.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt.cmd --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/reply/session.ts src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
